seo.description: Nudie body wash: bergamot, jasmine sambac & musk in a creamy niacinamide lather. Facial-grade vitamins, no sulfates or parabens. Vegan, made in LA.

products.title: 3-Pack Nudie
products.descriptionHtml:
BERGAMOT, JASMINE SAMBAC, AND MUSK.
A refreshingly intoxicating gel body wash with antioxidants and naturally hydrating ingredients. Soften and soothe while cleansing to help restore the drying effects of daily activity, wind, sun, and grime.

Infused with facial-grade Vitamin A/C/E and Niacinamide, our bodywash is formulated to nourish, soften and balance skin. Gentle Coconut-derived Surfactants provide a luxe, soft lather.

Vegan. Cruelty-free. No SLS / SLES. No Silicones. No Phthalates. No Parabens. No PEGs. Non-stripping. Non-drying. The formula is tested on all skin types and tones.

products.title: Fine Fragrance Discovery Samplers (Core line)
products.descriptionHtml:
OUR FIRST 4 SCENTS FOR YOUR DISCOVERY

Laurel Bath House's fine-fragrance discovery set includes three 2mls glass vials of our most captivating scents.

Mourning Wood: A contemporary twist on our most popular classic, evoking a sense of grounding with a sophisticated and sensual allure.

Cuffed: Aged leather, earthy tobacco, and bright raspberry melt into the skin for a warm, addictive scent.

Rocketman: A watery clean freshness encounters honeyed neroli for a light and clean musky finish.

Araki 40: A refreshing cherry blossom note with a bite of almond.

Encased in our gift-box packaging, this set offers an uplifting sensory journey, perfect for those seeking an opportunity to experience more of the Laurel Bath House collection or as a gift for a loved one.

Discovery Sets are not eligible for return.

products.title: Banana Hammock
products.descriptionHtml:
DEW-KISSED BERGAMOT. WHIPPED COCONUT. SUNBAKED TEAK.

OLFACTIVE FAMILY: Hespèridès. Floral

 The scent of summer. Combining a fresh dewy bergamot, sweet whipped coconut, and a warm, grounding teak wood base. Each ingredient is sustainably sourced, with upcycled extracts gathered from community-focused projects around the world.

products.descriptionHtml:
An advanced non-toxic deodorant formulated for 72-hour protection. Added skincare serum moisturizes the skin while advanced broad-spectrum antibacterial enzymes help neutralize odor and nourish your skin, before odor forms.

No Aluminum. No Baking Soda. No Parabens. No PEGs. No Synthetic Fragrance. Made without aluminum or phthalates.

Engineered to combat acidic ph and high-heat odor control from excessive sweating and activity, and smell amazing all day long.

products.title: Fine Fragrance Discovery Set (3 NEW SCENTS)
products.descriptionHtml:
3 SOUGHT-AFTER SCENTS FOR YOUR DISCOVERY

Laurel Bath House's fine-fragrance discovery set includes three 2mls frosted glass vials of our most captivating scents.

Banana Hammock: A playful yet refined summer poolside escape, blending dewy bergamot, whipped coconut, and the sun-warmed depth of teak wood.

Cannoli: A unisex twist on gourmand decadence, balancing a vintage zesty lemon with pistachio and a swirl of spiced cream, just like a Little Italy bakeshop.

Apres Ski: A boozy delight with maraschino cherry, whiskey, and a unique cold musk, that bring you right back to the ski lodge.

Encased in signature black packaging, this set offers an uplifting sensory journey, perfect for those seeking an opportunity to experience more of the Laurel Bath House collection or as a gift for a loved one.

Discovery Sets are not eligible for return.

products.title: 3 PACK | NUDIE
products.descriptionHtml:
BERGAMOT, JASMINE SAMBAC, AND MUSK.
A refreshingly intoxicating gel body wash with antioxidants and naturally hydrating ingredients. Soften and soothe while cleansing to help restore the drying effects of daily activity, wind, sun, and grime.

Infused with facial-grade Vitamin A/C/E and Niacinamide, our bodywash is formulated to nourish, soften and balance skin. Gentle Coconut-derived Surfactants provide a luxe, soft lather.

Vegan. Cruelty-free. No SLS / SLES. No Silicones. No Phthalates. No Parabens. No PEGs. Non-stripping. Non-drying. The formula is tested on all skin types and tones.

products.title: Post Nut Clarity Room Spray
products.descriptionHtml:
Meet Post Nut Clarity—our first room spray!

Bergamot Salt & Haitian Vetiver.

PNC is a clearing, spa-like bergamot salt blend that cuts the air with refreshing clarity, while luxurious Haitian vetiver grounds the scent with a complex woody richness. Naturally formulated and unapologetically sophisticated, this spray transforms any room into a sanctuary. Because sometimes you need a little clarity in a bottle.

NUDIE: BERGAMOT. JASMINE SAMBAC. MUSK

A refreshingly intoxicating gel body wash with antioxidants and naturally hydrating ingredients. Soften and soothe while cleansing to help restore the drying effects of daily activity, wind, sun, and grime.

Infused with facial-grade Vitamin A/C/E and Niacinamide, our body wash is formulated to nourish, soften and balance skin. Gentle Coconut-derived Surfactants provide a luxe, soft lather.

Vegan. Cruelty-free. No SLS / SLES. No Silicones. No Phthalates. No Parabens. No PEGs. Non-stripping. Non-drying. The formula is tested on all skin types and tones.

products.title: Fine Fragrance Discovery Samplers (Best Sellers)
products.descriptionHtml:
4 SOUGHT-AFTER SCENTS FOR DISCOVERY

Laurel Bath House's fine-fragrance discovery set includes four 2mls glass vials of our newest, most captivating scents.

E-Mochi: A refined fig and cozy Mochi escape, blending creamy mochi marshmallow, golden Japanese fig, and the depth of rice milk.

Cannoli: A unisex twist on gourmand decadence, balancing a vintage zesty lemon with pistachio and a swirl of spiced cream, just like a Little Italy bakeshop.

Not Vanilla: A vanilla orchid — a more bourbon and jasmine-like note. It's more vanilla seen through petals instead of bakery-sweet. Think unisex, grounded, luminous and quietly addictive.

Nudie: A skin-in-sauna delight with fresh bergamot, soft jasmine, and a rich musk, that smells so good, you'll want to stay in the nude.

Encased in our new gift-box packaging, this set offers an uplifting sensory journey, perfect for those seeking an opportunity to experience more of the Laurel Bath House collection or as a gift for a loved one.

Discovery Sets are not eligible for return.
